items.title: Translate C++ into safe Rust
items.oneliner: Clang-based transpiler converts C++ projects into safe Rust with tests, runtime support, and compile_commands.json project migration.

items.title: Build a peer-to-peer smart fan
items.oneliner: Hands-on ESP32 tutorial shows how to build a cloudless smart fan with iroh, Wi-Fi setup, and browser control.

items.title: Run Go in the browser
items.oneliner: Practical WASI walkthrough explains how to compile Go for browser sandboxes without the usual JavaScript WebAssembly bridge issues.

items.title: Debug HPC performance regressions
items.oneliner: Detailed Open MPI case study traces a 25 GB/s to 2.3 GB/s regression using reproducible Guix-based performance testing.

items.title: Generate cleaner blog preview cards
items.oneliner: Rust tool replaces generic AI blog art with custom Open Graph cards built from titles, abstracts, and tags.

items.title: Install a playful Debian desktop
items.oneliner: Debian-based Linux distro ships live-build sources, Calamares installer, and a lighter LXQt variant for older hardware.

items.title: Learn Otary through runnable tutorials
items.oneliner: New tutorials cover image cropping, OCR, geometry intersections, and scoring workflows with a practical Python library.

items.title: Simulate combustion engines in browser
items.oneliner: Web simulator lets you tweak bore, stroke, fuels, turbo settings, and watch torque and power change live.

items.title: Study AI-assisted debugging in practice
items.oneliner: Concrete bug-fixing walkthrough shows where AI helped, where it failed, and how to stay in control.

items.title: Understand the CPython ABI better
items.oneliner: Clear guide explains ABI, ABI3, symbols, and extension compatibility for Python developers shipping compiled packages.
